headline: Is UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Now A Potential Opportunity After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Wondering if UnitedHealth Group at a last close of US$273.98 now reflects a potential opportunity or lingering risk? This overview focuses squarely on what the current price might say about value. The stock has returned 1.3% over the past 7 days, while the 30 day, year to date and 1 year returns of 7.1%, 18.6% and 46.2% declines highlight a very different recent and longer term picture. Recent coverage around the stock has focused on how investors are reassessing large US healthcare names,...
